description: Initial screen state showing the Askable dashboard with a list of studies, a sidebar on the left, and a search bar at the top.
frame_description: The Askable dashboard is visible. The sidebar contains links for 'Studies' and 'Project Delivery'. The main area shows a table of studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, Closing date, Created date, and Created by.

description: User hovers over the 'Apply' button on the Opportunities page.
User clicks on the search input field.
User types 'in studies' into the search field.
The list of studies filters in real-time as the user types the search query.
User clicks the checkbox for the 'Askable Help Center - Existing Structure Card Sort' study.
The checkbox state changes to checked and the row is highlighted.
User clicks the checkbox to deselect the study.
User clicks on the search input field.
User clears the previous search and types 'participant.app wait'.
Search results update to show 'No matching results for "participant.app wa"'.
User clicks the 'Reset' button.
Search is reset, and the full list of studies is restored in the table.
Search results update for 'participant app w'

frame_description: The screen now shows a text summary and individual responses for the question regarding other wallet apps.

description: User scrolls down through the list of individual responses.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through a table of participant responses, including names, answers, and completion dates.

description: User clicks the '+10 more' button at the bottom of the responses list.
The list of individual responses expands to show more items.
frame_description: Additional rows of participant responses appear in the table.

description: User scrolls back to the top of the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls up past the individual responses and summary section to the top of the page.

description: User clicks on the 'Build' tab in the top navigation bar.
Page navigates from the 'Results' tab to the 'Build' tab.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The screen transitions to the survey builder interface, showing the sequence of questions and logic.
